arts.ttl: Sunday's Transfer Talk Update: Dani Carvajal, Jerdy Schouten, Nacho
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up the latest confirmed transfer news and speculation from across the footballing world.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid still have strong interest in big-name transfer and set deadline for talks
arts.sum: Real Madrid still have a strong interest in the potential transfer of Bayern Munich left-back Alphonso Davies, according to Fabrizio Romano. The Canada international has been a star performer for Bayern for many years now, but he’s nearing the end of his contract at the Allianz Arena, and this has Real waiting in the wings […] The post Real Madrid still have strong interest in big-name transfer and set deadline for talks appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid 4-1 Espanyol: Player ratings as Vinicius inspires comeback victory
arts.sum: Thibaut Courtois' unfortunate own goal early in the second half put the pressure on, but Madrid responded by bringing Vinicius off the bench and were celebrating Dani Carvajal's equaliser just moments later. Rodrygo tapped home a second with 15 minutes to go, before Vinicius grabbed his deserved goal to put the game to bed, and there was still time for a late Kylian Mbappe penalty to send the fans home happy.

arts.ttl: The Numbers Narrative: Real Madrid 4-1 Espanyol
arts.sum: Despite their early struggles to find the back of the net, Madrid completely dominated the match, as reflected in their 73% possession and 341 passes in Espanyol’s half, compared to just 71 from the visitors. With eight big chances, 14 shots on target, and 73% possession overall, Real Madrid once again found their scoring touch in the second half to secure a 4-1 victory.

arts.ttl: Transfer Talk: Bayern's Davies to join Real Madrid on a free
arts.sum: Bayern Munich have given up on a contract renewal for Alphonso Davies while Real Madrid are determined to ensure they sign the left-back, as has been reported by Relevo . That is especially interesting for them as the possibility of Davies renewing his Bayern contract is becoming increasingly unlikely, with talks between the Bavarian club and his agent currently being non-existent.

arts.ttl: Managing Madrid Podcast: Real Madrid 4 - 1 Espanyol, La Liga 2024 - 2025
arts.sum: On this episode of the Managing Madrid Podcast, Kiyan Sobhani breaks down Real Madrid ’s 4 - 1 win over Espanyol at the Bernabeu on Saturday night. It also serves as a means for Real Madrid fans to connect and discuss the team.
